description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:9 Docker image with a before_script that runs `node -v`, `npm -v`, and installs client dependencies via `cd client && npm install && cd ..`. Define three stages: test, client_build, and deploy. Add a client_lint job in the test stage that runs `cd client` then `npm run lint`. Add a client_build job in the client_build stage that runs `cd client` then `npm run build`, and publish the `client/dist` directory as an artifact that expires in 2 weeks. Add a server_deploy job in the deploy stage that runs `cp -r client/dist server/static`, `cd server`, `git init`, `git config user.name "Gitlab CI"`, `git config user.email "mui.kaien@dhs.sg"`, `git add . && git commit -m "deploy from gitlab"`, `git remote add heroku https://heroku:$HEROKU_API_KEY@git.heroku.com/sccl-dictionary.git`, and `git push heroku master -f`; this job only runs on the master or web branches and stores the `server` directory as an artifact expiring in 2 weeks, deploying to Heroku.
